title: E-Commerce Sales Analysis (Olist)
summary: Exploratory data analysis on around 100k transaction records from Brazilian e-commerce platform. The goals is to uncovering patterns of customer behavior when using the e-commerce
description: Analyzed 100k+ transaction records from Olist's Brazilian e-commerce platform to answer business question about how is customer behavior, delivery performance, and payment preferences. The goal was to get a key insight that could help improve customer satisfaction and business strategy
highlights: Peak orders of shopping occurs Monday to Wednesday between 9AM - 6 PM, suggesting weekday have the highest transaction volume

Delivery speed have positive impacts on satisfaction. Orders that arriving 13 days early have average 5-star ratings, while 1-star rating occurs when orders arrive only 4 days early. This suggesting customer expectation play a key role
Credit card is the dominant payment method at 76% of transactions and carrying the highest average transaction value

title: Cafe Management Web Application
summary: A lightweight web-based database application built for a cafe startup to integrating inventory, menu, and sales management into a system with automated ingredient tracking on every transaction
description: Built a lightweight web-based database application for a cafe startup to manage day-to-day operational. The app connects inventory, menu, and sales, where inputting a sales automatically deducts ingredients that listed in inventory based on the recipe linked on menu item.
highlights: Inventory management with low-stock and unavailable menu alerts visible on the dashboard
Menu and recipe management, each menu is linked to ingredients listed in inventory
Sales input that automatically tracks daily transaction history and deducts ingredient availability based on recipe.

title: Performance Analysis of Induction Stove Converter Materials Based on Energy Consumption, Efficiency, and Cost
summary: An experimental study comparing three alternatives of ferromagnetic materials as induction stove converter plates to analyze energy consumption and efficiency to identify the most viable alternative for low-income households
description: Experiment about analyzing the performan of three affordable economic ferromagnetic material, mild steel, galvanized steel, and galvannealed steel as a induction stove plates that evaluated based on energy consumption, efficiency, and production cost. The study aims to provide a  cost-effective alternative besides commercial converters for low-income households.
highlights: Designed a Completely Randomized Design (CRD) experiment boiling 1 liter of water across factor of power levels (500W and 1000W) and experiment duration (300-600 sec), with data optimized using Response Surface Methodology in Minitab Software
Galvanized steel achieved the highest composite desirability score (0.761) and the best energy efficiency (40,99%), making it to be the top material performed from an energy.
Galvannealed steel demonstrated a better thermal durability between other materials and have the lowest energy consumption (72.296 Wh), making it the best choice for long term.

title: Vehicle Routing Optimization
summary: A web about Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) dashboard built for a logistics company to optimize multi-vehicle delivery routes using the Clarke-Wright Savings Algorithm
description: Full Stack VRP dashboard (heavy javascript) that enables logistics planner to optimize delivery routes across multiple vehicles. The system incorporates real-world road networks using OSRM routing engine based on vehicle assignment by demand (tonase) and volume. Thus, the web provides delivery history tracking with Excel export capability.
highlights: Implemented Clarke-Wright Savings Algorithm in Python to generate optimal multi-vehicle routes, implemented in web to reduce planning time for daily delivery operations.
Using OSRM routing engine with Leaflet.js to render real-road map routes with delivery stop markers and estimated travel time.
Built using Flask, SQLAlchemy, and Bootstrap with features including a step by step to calculate optimal route.
